name: manage
description: Reflect on your own working session — the meta-lane (the work process itself, not the code/decisions/docs/reasoning the other plugins operate on). Three seed skills: catchup (re-orient on where the work stands now, rebuilt from git/diff/plan, not chat memory), summarize (a complete, objective recap of what the session did — the raw input observe distills), observe (distill the one durable, reusable learning into a knowledge base). The triad is orient -> recap -> distill. Read-only except observe's single write. Cross-project, language-agnostic.
